azureRuntimeValidationGates.description: The SQL-first operational store connection path must be configured before deploying a runtime host.
azureRuntimeValidationGates.remediationHint: Configure the environment-specific SQL connection source through Key Vault, managed identity, or approved deployment settings.

azureRuntimeValidationGates.description: Migration manifests, exports, and evidence artifacts require an approved artifact storage account/container mapping.
azureRuntimeValidationGates.remediationHint: Register the artifact storage account/container mapping for the target environment.

azureRuntimeValidationGates.description: Application Insights or equivalent telemetry must be wired before real migration execution.
azureRuntimeValidationGates.remediationHint: Configure the telemetry connection string or managed identity-backed telemetry ingestion settings.

azureRuntimeValidationGates.description: Queue workers require explicit queue binding metadata before being admitted into an environment.
azureRuntimeValidationGates.remediationHint: Register queue namespace, queue name, visibility timeout, and poison queue settings for the worker host role.
